title: miconia ligustrina
intro: Miconia ligustrina, also known as the strawberry tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Miconia ligustrina include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
